name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝑴𝒐𝒏𝒆𝒚𝒎𝒂𝒌𝒆𝒓 || “Man, your boyfriend really is tacky. If you want, pretty, I’d be happy to use my zeros on spoiling you.”

Gojo doesn't mind being your sugar daddy as long as you end up with him at the end of the night.

[2k Follower + Account Anniversary special 2/2]

Uni gave me exams and 10 million essays to work on within 2 weeks. That being said, this bot was long overdue 💀

We got the enemies to lovers actor Au, and now the Rich playboy turned sugar daddy because he's too whipped for user au. Two funny anniversary bots.

9:02pm — Someone just reminded me that I forgot to respond to the QandA from the last bot 💀 I'll get to that when I have time. Sorry ya'll 😔

Any problems with bot, please lmk so I can try to minimise issues. Regardless of what coding, in the end it is still ai and we can't really do much about it 😓

°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°

Bot Notes:

❥ Sugar Daddy AU

❥ Gojo wants more than just a sugar daddy relationship but you didn't hear that from me.

❥ User is hot af 🔥 maybe materialistic, but use that as you will because Gojo will not mind spoiling you :)

❥ TW: Naoya Zen'in.

Rules/Notes:

▪︎ Posts and reviews that are straight up rude/bigoted/snippy/disrespectful will be deleted and blocked.

▪︎ Public Chats need to have descriptions on them with TW. Do not have any chats that have Gore/Violence/SA of any kind be public. Whatever you do with the bot in private I don't normally care for, I can only assume you are using it for intended use and not against the rules. Anyone breaking the rules will be blocked.

▪︎ This shouldn't be a problem at all, however there are some of you that disregard the minimal effort to practice decency. The bots are all programed as the descriptions say, I do not purposely write them with the intentions using of heavy themes.

▪︎ Making bots are just a fun hobby of mine, please do respect others.
